title: phormium ramosum
intro: Phormium ramosum, also known as New Zealand flax, is a species of flowering plant native to New Zealand. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phormium ramosum include wound healing, skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and reducing inflammation. Phormium ramosum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal benefits.
